title: Section 48
content: (1) Notwithstanding anything contained in 1[the Income-tax Act, 1961 (43 of 1961)] or any other enactment for the time being in force relating to income-tax or super-tax, the bank shall not be liable to pay income-tax or super-tax on any of its income, profits or gains. 2* * * * * 3* * * * *
footnote: 1. . Subs. by Act 24 of 1978, s. 9, for "Indian Income-tax Act, 1922" (w.e.f. 21-7-1978). 2. The proviso omitted by Act 62 of 1948, s. 7 and the Schedule (w.e.f. 1-1-1949). 3. Sub-section (2) omitted by s. 7 and the Schedule, ibid. (w.e.f. 1-1-1949).
